features.news_title: Claude Code got my Meta ads account permanently banned. Don't make the same mistake I did.
features.suggestion_ko: 'Claude Code got my Meta ads account permanently banned. Don't make the same mistake I did.' → Amazon 데이터 통합 코드 품질 향상에 활용 가능!
features.suggestion_zh: 'Claude Code got my Meta ads account permanently banned. Don't make the same mistake I did.' → 可應用於 Amazon 數據整合
features.learning_note_ko:
💡 Claude Code got my Meta ads account permanently banned. Don't make the same mistake I did.
   → Claude Code를 Meta 광고 계정에 연결했는데 모든 것을 자동화할 수 있을 줄 알았습니다. 캠페인 데이터를 가져오고, 크리에이티브를 생...
   → 벨라님 프로젝트 'Amazon 데이터 통합'에 적용하면 효율 UP!
features.learning_note_zh:
💡 Claude Code got my Meta ads account permanently banned. Don't make the same mistake I did.
   → 摘要：我把 Claude Code 連接到我們的 Meta 廣告帳戶，以為能自動化所有事務。提取活動數據、生成創意內容、轉移預算...
   → 應用到 Bella 的專案「Amazon 數據整合」可提升效率！
